title: Complex Communication and Debate: Speaking Lesson 5 - Interactive Practice
instructions: Complete the gap fill task. Use the lesson examples for support.

items.prompt: Choose the best sentence using cleft sentences.
options: Correct use of cleft sentences in a B2 sentence.
Incorrect word order with cleft sentences.
items.feedback_correct: Correct. The sentence uses cleft sentences accurately.
items.feedback_incorrect: Check the form and meaning of cleft sentences.

items.prompt: Match the research phrase to its meaning.
items.feedback_correct: Good matching. You understand the phrase meaning.
items.feedback_incorrect: Look again at the context and key words.

items.prompt: Build a complete answer for the lesson task.
items.model_answer: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand research.
items.feedback_correct: Well done. Your sentence is complete and meaningful.
items.feedback_incorrect: Check that your sentence has a subject, verb and clear meaning.

instant_feedback.correct: Correct. Continue to the next step.
instant_feedback.partly_correct: Good start. Check accuracy and add one more detail.
instant_feedback.incorrect: Try again. Review the model and look at the key language.
